args.code:
import re
word_count = 0
sentence_count = 0
for line in open('generated_text.txt', 'r'): 
    words = re.findall(r\S+', line.decode('utf-8'))
    word_count += len(words)
    sentence_count += len(re.findall(r[\s\.!?]+(?=[\s\.!?]|$)', line.decode('utf-8'))) 
print('Word count: ', word_count)
print('Sentence count: ', sentence_count)

import re
word_count = 0
sentence_count = 0

    words = re.findall(r\S+', text)
    word_count = len(words)
    sentence_count = len(re.findall(r\s\.!?]+(?=[\s\.!?]|$)', text)) 
print('Word count: ', word_count)
print('Sentence count: ', sentence_count)
